decisions.reasoning: WWDC 2026 (June 8) disappointed: rebuilt Siri arrived 2 years late with EU and China regulatory restrictions blocking deployment across ~35% of iPhone shipments. AAPL SMA signal flat (fast $299.30 < slow $300.27), stock below both moving averages. Valuation stretched at ~36x P/E vs 26x historical average. Rotated proceeds into QQQ for better-signaled broad tech exposure.

sources.headline: WWDC 2026: Apple makes its big Siri AI reveal
AAPL Stock Slides Following WWDC, But Analysts Broadly Raise Targets
Apple Stock After WWDC 2026: $400 Bull vs $215 Bear Case

decisions.invalidation: EU/China regulatory approval for Siri deployment, or a surprise partnership announcement that materially changes AI execution narrative

decisions.reasoning: QQQ SMA signal long (fast $723.20 > slow $718.44) vs AAPL flat. Broad Nasdaq-100 exposure diversifies single-stock AI execution risk. Fed holding rates steady (99% probability no change at June 16-17 FOMC), supportive macro. QQQ Q2 2026 saw strongest gains; projected 36% earnings growth for constituent basket. Rotated from AAPL to reduce single-stock risk while maintaining tech exposure.

decisions.invalidation: QQQ closes below slow SMA ($718), or macro shock from FOMC surprise, or broad tech earnings miss

decisions.reasoning: Azure revenue +39% YoY in Q2 FY2026 ($32.9B), total revenue +17% ($81.3B). Quarterly dividend $0.91/share declared June 10. Despite Q1 2026 stock decline (~22%) and high capex burden ($100B+/yr), the cloud business is growing strongly. Signal flat but fundamental thesis (cloud + AI infrastructure) remains intact. No new negative catalyst today.

sources.headline: Microsoft FY2026 Q2 Earnings: Azure +39% YoY

decisions.invalidation: Azure growth decelerates below 25% or capex returns disappoint materially in next earnings

decisions.reasoning: Q1 FY2027 record results: $81.6B revenue +85% YoY and +20% QoQ (SEC filing April 26, 2026). $25B bond offering (exceeding initial $20B target) closed June 15-16, signaling strong institutional confidence. AI data center demand secular tailwind intact. Signal flat but just above slow SMA. Custom silicon risk (hyperscalers growing from 20.9% to 27.8% share) and China export restrictions are real but not near-term catalysts.

sources.headline: NVIDIA secures $25 billion in strong bond offering

decisions.invalidation: Data center revenue decelerates sharply, custom silicon displaces H100/B100 faster than expected, or China export restrictions tighten further

decisions.reasoning: Only profitable position (+2.92%). SMA signal long (fast $743.90 > slow $743.48). Fed holding rates at 3.5-3.75% (June 16-17 meeting, no change consensus). S&P 500 wall-street targets range $7,100-$7,800 (BofA to Morgan Stanley). Broad market remains constructive; SPY acts as portfolio ballast.

sources.headline: Fed Funds forecast: 99% no change at June 2026 FOMC meeting

decisions.invalidation: SPY closes below slow SMA or FOMC delivers surprise hawkish action

summary: First session: closed AAPL on WWDC disappointment/EU-China Siri restrictions, rotated into QQQ (long signal); held MSFT/NVDA/SPY on intact theses
open_theses: MSFT: Azure +39% YoY cloud growth thesis intact; holding through capex headwinds; watch late-July earnings
NVDA: Record Q1 FY2027 + $25B bond success; AI data center demand secular; watch custom silicon share erosion
QQQ: Long signal, broad Nasdaq-100 tech exposure replacing AAPL single-stock risk; thesis holds above slow SMA $718
SPY: Long signal, Fed on hold, market constructive; portfolio ballast
